title: Enhanced Potions
description: Introducing a mod that expands the realm of potions in your favorite game! Delve into an enhanced experience as we introduce an additional stage to vanilla potions, offering new possibilities for your gameplay.
body:
Introducing a mod that expands the realm of potions in your favorite game! Delve into an enhanced experience as we introduce an additional stage to vanilla potions, offering new possibilities for your gameplay.

And there's more to come! Stay tuned for future updates that will introduce a selection of intriguing new potions, designed to add depth and excitement to your battles.

 

Unleash the potential of stronger potions and witness how they can elevate the intensity of your fights. With careful attention to balance, these potions require end game materials to ensure a fair and enjoyable gameplay experience, preventing them from becoming excessively dominant.

 

Embark on a captivating journey through the realm of alchemy, where the utilization of these enhanced potions can shape your combat encounters. Explore new strategies, face challenging adversaries, and discover the impact of these thoughtfully crafted additions. With this mod, battles become more dynamic, offering a balanced and engaging experience. Are you ready to embrace the potential and take your adventures to the next level? Download the mod now and embark on an exciting new chapter

 

I would be greatefull for any ideas on what I should add to the mod, if you have any ideas just write a comment. Thank you in advance


————————————————
————————————————


This List Is Only Temporary, I'm Currently Working On JEI Support!!! 

 

Potion Brewing Stand Recipe List :

 
Instant Health 3 Potion :
Instant Health 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Strength 3 Potion :
Strength 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Swiftness 3 Potion :
Swiftness 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Slowness 3 Potion :
Slowness 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Harming 3 Potion :
Harming 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Poison 3 Potion :
Poison 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Weakness 3 Potion :
Weakness 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Jump Boost 3 Potion :
Jump Boost 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

Haste Potion :
Swiftness Potion + Golden Apple

 

Luck Potion :
Akward Potion + Nautilus Shell

 

Bad Luck Potion :
Luck Potion + Fermented Spider eye

 

Glowing Potion :
Akward Potion + Glowstone Block

 

Mining Fatigue Potion :
Akward Potion + Prismarine Shard

 

Wither Potion :
Akward Potion + Wither Rose

 

Wither Protection Potion :
Akward Potion + Wither Skull

 

Blindness Potion :
Night Vision Potion + Fermented Spider Eye

 

Poison Resistance Potion :
Poison Potion + Golden Apple

 

Levitation Potion :
Akward Potion + Shulker Shell

 

Flight Potion :
Levitation 2 Potion + Nether Star

 

This List Is Only Temporary, I'm Currently Working On JEI Support!!!
